about.title: About Knowlytics Hub
about.subtitle: Our Mission, Vision & Story
about.missionText: To democratize data analytics education across the Arab world by providing world-class, practical, and accessible training that empowers professionals to transform their careers.
about.visionText: To be the leading data analytics and AI education platform in the Arab world, producing a generation of data-driven professionals who drive business growth.
about.storyText: Mohamed Abdelfattah founded Knowlytics Hub with a simple mission: make data analytics accessible to every Arabic-speaking professional. What started as a YouTube channel has grown into a full-fledged training platform serving 7,000+ trainees and 15+ companies.
about.reason1: Expert instructors with real industry experience
